description_long: This is a tall, conical cup with a smooth, slightly flared rim and a gently tapering body. The exterior is a soft yellow color and features a vibrant decorative pattern of fruit slices, including a large watermelon segment and several orange slices, rendered in a realistic, colorful style. The fruit motif wraps partially around the cup, with the watermelon slice being the most prominent element, accompanied by overlapping orange slices. The cup appears to be made of lightweight plastic, with a uniform matte finish and no visible seams or handles. The interior is plain and matches the exterior yellow color, suggesting a single-piece construction. There are no visible logos, branding, or text, and the cup is fully opaque.
description: A tall, yellow conical cup with a colorful fruit slice pattern featuring watermelon and orange slices, made of smooth plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full fruit motif with a large watermelon slice and two orange slices overlapping at the base.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the large watermelon slice and a single orange slice, with the fruit pattern more centered.
description_view_2: Rear view with only the edge of the watermelon slice visible, and most of the cup's yellow surface exposed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the watermelon and orange slices, with most of the cup's surface plain yellow.
